markets.question: Spread: Crystal Palace FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Europa Conference League game, scheduled for March 12 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Crystal Palace FC" if Crystal Palace FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "AEK Lárnakas".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.description: More markets for the UEFA Europa Conference League game, scheduled for March 12 at 4:00 PM ET.

markets.question: Chelsea FC vs. Newcastle United FC: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Premier League game between Chelsea FC and Newcastle United FC, scheduled for March 14 at 1:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Chelsea FC and Newcastle United FC combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

markets.question: Chelsea FC vs. Newcastle United FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Premier League game between Chelsea FC and Newcastle United FC, scheduled for March 14 at 1:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Chelsea FC and Newcastle United FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
